message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-progress): pin ProgressController tracking + throttle + phase transitions (br-0qt8i)

ProgressController (br-w82c) is the host's long-running operation
progress tracker with throttled emission. Zero conformance coverage
despite documented invariants around throttle behaviour and phase
state-machine semantics.

Adds 14 tests against the public fcp_host::ProgressController API:

- start_tracking_initializes_state
- record_update_on_unknown_operation_returns_false_and_does_not_allocate
  (no-allocation discipline — silent fill-attack prevention)
- first_update_for_tracked_operation_always_emits (last_emitted=None
  is the documented bypass for the throttle guard)
- second_update_within_throttle_interval_is_not_emitted_but_latest_still_tracks
  (throttle behaviour: emission throttled but internal latest_update
  stays current — pollers reading via latest_update get the most
  recent value regardless of emission cadence)
- second_update_after_throttle_interval_is_emitted (real-time
  20 ms config + 40 ms sleep)
- record_phase_transition_moves_current_into_completed
- record_phase_transition_on_unknown_op_returns_false
- notifications_capture_emitted_updates_and_phase_transitions
  (Update + Phase variants tracked separately and tagged with
  the original operation_id + request_id)
- stop_tracking_removes_operation_and_returns_notifications
- stop_tracking_on_unknown_op_returns_empty (no-panic contract)
- computed_percentage_returns_none_when_total_is_none (indeterminate
  progress)
- computed_percentage_returns_none_when_total_is_zero (div-by-zero
  defense)
- computed_percentage_returns_correct_fraction
- aggregate_reports_total_operations_and_in_progress

All 14 pass locally in 0.05s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
host_progress_controller_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
